Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naru clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Naru clan are the traditional servants of the Blackflame family and became the face of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Naru clan has shining emerald wings and a loyal reputation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Naru clan is a group mentioned by Cassias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Naru clan only permits a handful of disciples to use the Blackflame Trials each year.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Naru is an imperial clan.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Naru clan follows the Path of Grasping Sky.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Naru Huan is the Patriarch of the Naru clan.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Naru clan has a headquarters on a hilltop near a shadowy portal.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Naru clan is a group.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
